{{Infobox group
| name = Black dragon Remnants
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Enemies of [[Emala]] might include black [[dragon]] [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] can release a black [[dragon]] [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has the black [[dragon]] [[Remnants]] locked away.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Orthos, release one of the black dragon Remnants, if you don’t mind.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
